summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ObaidTradez AI Trading Platform - 7 Critical Fixes. Backend: 16/17 tests passed (94%). Frontend: All key features verified working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 200 for invalid access code instead of 401/403 - minor security concern but not related to the 7 critical fixes

critical_code_review_comments: Direction Bug Fix VERIFIED: positive_action = 'BUY' if direction == 'LONG' else 'SELL' correctly implemented in DayTradingEngine.evaluate_buy()
Confidence Score Normalization VERIFIED: base_confidence = 35 in TechnicalSignalGenerator.analyze(), wider distribution observed (Elite=0, Strong=1, Acceptable=7)
Momentum Mode Control VERIFIED: RelVol >= 2.5 requirement enforced, 0% momentum mode candidates observed (strict filtering working)
Pre-Market Safety VERIFIED: market_session = 'pre_market' returned, UI shows 'Auto-execution disabled until 9:30 AM ET'
MTF Conflict Detection VERIFIED: 5 MTF conflicts detected, explicit logging in MultiTimeframeConfirmer.confirm() with reject_reasons
Trade Logging System VERIFIED: /api/auto-trade/trade-log endpoint returns 200, trade_log collection ready for executions
Frontend Diagnostics VERIFIED: Confidence distribution card, Momentum %, Market Session badge, Trade Log tab all working
seed_data_creation: None required - using live market data from Polygon API
context_for_next_testing_agent: 7 Critical Fixes fully tested and verified. Key observations: 1) Direction mapping LONG→BUY, SHORT→SELL working correctly across all candidates. 2) Confidence scores now distributed with base=35 (Elite=0, Strong=1, Acceptable=7, Below 65=0). 3) Momentum mode at 0% due to strict RelVol>2.5 requirement. 4) Pre-market safety gate active with 'Auto-execution disabled until 9:30 AM ET'. 5) MTF conflicts=5 with explicit rejection reasons in pipeline funnel. 6) Trade log endpoint working, empty in pre-market (expected). 7) All frontend diagnostics cards working correctly.

momentum_mode_control.reason: Strict RelVol>2.5 requirement filtering out candidates

rejection_reasons: MTF CONFLICT: 5m structure bearish opposes LONG direction: 3
